summary: 列出指定类型对象的属性
description: 该命令用于列出与指定对象类型（如单元、时钟、设计、网络、引脚等）相关联的属性。
usage: list_property [-help] [-type {cell clock design lib lib_cell lib_pin lib_timing_arc net path_group pin port timing_arc timing_path timing_point pg_net pg_pin lib_pg_pin si_victim si_attacker}]

options.name: -help
options.description: 打印出命令的使用说明

options.name: -type
options.description: 指定要列出属性的对象类型。可选值包括：cell, clock, design, lib, lib_cell, lib_pin, lib_timing_arc, net, path_group, pin, port, timing_arc, timing_path, timing_point, pg_net, pg_pin, lib_pg_pin, si_victim, si_attacker。
